reviews.name: Sarah & James
reviews.text: Maddie captured our wedding day with such grace and professionalism. The photos are more than we could have ever dreamed of.

reviews.name: The Harrison Family
reviews.text: We've had many family photoshoots over the years, but none felt as relaxed and natural as this one.

reviews.name: Emily R.
reviews.text: The most gentle and patient photographer. Our newborn session was so calm, and the photos are timeless treasures.

faqs.question: When will we receive our photos?
faqs.answer: Hi there! For lifestyle sessions like Newborn and Family, you'll receive your gallery within 3 weeks. For Weddings, because of the extra care and storytelling involved, I typically deliver the full high-res gallery within 6-8 weeks, though I always send a sneak peek within 48 hours!

faqs.question: What should we wear for our session?
faqs.answer: I love this question! My biggest tip is to coordinate, not match. Aim for neutral tones and textures—linens, knits, and soft fabrics look beautiful in Melbourne's natural light. I'll send you a full styling guide once you've booked your date!

faqs.question: What happens if it rains during an outdoor shoot?
faqs.answer: Don't worry! If the weather isn't playing along, we can either lean into the moodiness (I have some very cute clear umbrellas!) or we can reschedule to a clearer day. For Newborn sessions, we're usually safe indoors anyway!

faqs.question: Do you travel outside of Bayside Melbourne?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! While I'm based in Bayside, I frequent Victoria and Tasmania regularly. I'm always happy to travel for love and beautiful light. Just let me know your location in the inquiry form and we can chat about the arrangements.

faqs.question: Can we have the RAW/unedited files?
faqs.answer: I only deliver fully edited, high-resolution JPEG files. Part of the Maddie Rose Studio experience is the signature editing style you see in my portfolio. I promise you're only getting the absolute best shots from our time together!
